active_projects.description: Move visual theme selection into /slides planning phase. active_projects.description: Enrich /slides task description to include source material file paths, template references, and key forcing data details. Currently, /slides creates a task whose description omits the file paths passed as input and gathered during forcing questions — these end up only in forcing_data.source_materials in state.json but not in the user-facing description or TODO.md entry. Changes target .claude/commands/slides.md Stage 1 (Steps 2-4): construct the description by incorporating the primary source file path, any example template paths from source_materials, talk type, audience context summary, and output format. Ensure the TODO.md Description block includes the same detail.

artifacts.summary: 6 findings on slides.md description construction; fix is new Step 2.5 enriching $desc with forcing_data fields

active_projects.description: Refactor slides system: split slides-agent into three focused agents (slides-research-agent, pptx-assembly-agent, slidev-assembly-agent) to reduce context window usage and improve consistency. The current slides-agent.md (553 lines) combines format-agnostic research with format-specific assembly, loading all context regardless of workflow. Split research workflow (Stages 0-8) into slides-research-agent, PPTX assembly (Stages A1-A8) into pptx-assembly-agent, and create a new slidev-assembly-agent for Slidev markdown generation. Update skill-slides routing to dispatch to the correct agent based on workflow_type and output_format. Update the /slides command, context index, extensions.json, and CLAUDE.md documentation. Each agent should only load the context it needs, progressively.

active_projects.description: Conference talk walking through the zed/examples/epi-study synthetic RCT demo (KAT vs TAU, adjusted OR 3.29) as an end-to-end showcase of the /epi Claude Code workflow for a mixed clinical/informatics audience

source_materials: /home/benjamin/.config/zed/examples/epi-study/ (systematic review of entire directory: README.md, EPI_ANSWERS.md, scripts/, data/, reports/consort_report.md, reports/tables/*, logs/)
forcing_data.audience_context: Mixed clinical/informatics audience. Topic: demonstrating the Claude Code /epi extension via a synthetic RCT (ketamine-assisted therapy vs treatment-as-usual for methamphetamine use disorder, N=200, primary adjusted OR=3.29 for 12-week abstinence). Conference format, 15-20 min. Balance tooling narrative, methods/CONSORT rigor, and the headline clinical finding. Emphasize reproducibility (deterministic seeds, base-R fallbacks) and the four-step /epi -> /research -> /plan -> /implement workflow.
